---
title: "Edit the resolv.conf file"
date: 2013-09-22
forum: General Help
---

### Post by sequimbob on 2013-09-22
I am trying to set up a vpn and need to edit the resolv.conf file.  However, when I open it in Gedit, the comment are as follows: "# Dynamic resolv.conf(5) file for glibc resolver(3) generated by resolvconf(8)
#     DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE BY HAND -- YOUR CHANGES WILL BE OVERWRITTEN".  If I make changes and add a nameserver, it will not stay as it is overwritten after I save the file.  How do I edit this file and keep the changes?

---

### Post by wojox on 2013-09-22
You can add them to [ /etc/network/interfaces]("http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=1972424&p=12083494#post12083494")

---

### Post by sequimbob on 2013-09-23
Thanks, that worked. i appreciate the help.

---
